steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student must contrast the two fiber samples. The notes give their thicknesses: TPU is 3 mm, SEBS is 4 mm. A contrast shows a difference between them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: describes torsional heating in general without naming either sample specifically. ✗
  • Choice B: names both samples but describes only what the study did, not how the two samples differed. ✗
  • Choice C: mentions both samples but says both temperatures rose — that's a similarity, not a contrast. ✗
  • Choice D: states that the SEBS sample (4 mm) was thicker than the TPU sample (3 mm), directly showing a measurable difference between the two. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
